description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jguyomard/laravel-php:7.2 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and define CI_DEBUG_SERVICES, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Set a cache on the vendor/ directory and a global before_script that runs apk update, installs git zip bash and nodejs npm, globally installs gulp, gulp-cli, gulp-babel and babel-preset-es2015 via npm, chmods storage, storage/logs, package/app and bootstrap/cache to 777, removes .env.testing, copies .env.ci to .env.testing, and executes COMPOSER_PROCESS_TIMEOUT=2000 composer install. In the test stage add a test:app job that executes ./vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never and, on failure, uploads the storage/logs directory as an artifact. The pipeline contains a single stage named test.
